div.head: The Ambassador in Mexico (Daniels) to the Secretary of State
div.p: 323. I had a talk with General Hay today with reference to your No. 143 of July 21, 6 p.m. I am sending result of the long conversation by air mail Sunday.Not found in Department files. It should reach you Monday or Tuesday.

He said he was glad you sent the note addressed to Ambassador Castillo Nájera regarding land expropriations.Dated July 21, p. 674. He added that his Government is giving careful consideration to the reply which will be made by one gentleman government to another. He did not indicate the date when the answer will be forwarded but I gathered it would be within a short time.
